name: Rye Tomato Bread
recipeIngredient: 7/8 cup tomato juice or vegetable juice (V-8)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order given into the bread pan.
2. Select white bread setting.
3. Push Start.
Note: This tangy, tasty rye bread makes great sandwiches—especially with cheese—and adds a festive touch to soups and winter casseroles. It makes 1 loaf, 8 slices. Each slice contains 215 calories; less than 1 gm dietary fiber; less than 1 gm soluble fiber; 43 gm carbohydrates; 7 gm protein; 2 gm fat (10% calories from fat); 0 mg cholesterol; 331 mg sodium; and 110 mg potassium.
